company: Underdog.io -Apply to top tech jobs in 60 seconds. A place where companies apply to you
strengths: Production ELT with Airflow, dbt, BigQuery
weaknesses: Limited explicit years in data engineering (role span ~3 years)
No explicit feature store or ML feature engineering
Limited demonstrated production AI/ML deployment experience
improvement_bullets: Developed production-grade ELT pipelines in Python and Airflow, implementing real-time streaming ingestion logic for high-frequency data and establishing monitoring frameworks for data observability.
Engineered AI-ready data infrastructure by building vector stores and embedding pipelines to support semantic search and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) capabilities.
Designed and maintained feature stores for ML workflows, ensuring high-performance access to enriched datasets for predictive modeling and agentic AI features.
Architected robust data observability and monitoring systems within dbt and Great Expectations to track data lineage, quality, and freshness in production environments.
Applied advanced data modeling techniques to structure unstructured franchise data into normalized schemas, optimizing for downstream AI agent consumption and high-speed retrieval.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with the company. I am interested in this opportunity because of your mission to revolutionize the fragmented franchise industry through an agentic AI platform. What interests me about working for your team is your commitment to an AI-native culture, which inspires me because I am deeply passionate about bridging the gap between raw, complex datasets and production-ready AI agents. I believe my expertise in building end-to-end data pipelines and my experience with modern data orchestration tools would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on automation and scalability. In fact, while building the FRED Economic Batch Pipeline project, I utilized Python, Airflow, and dbt to ingest complex API data into BigQuery, implementing automated data quality checks with Great Expectations and CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions. This resulted in a production-grade warehouse that significantly reduced analyst query times and ensured high data reliability. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role would allow me to bring my technical expertise in ELT design to your goal of building an industry knowledge graph. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration and API integration skills. I worked closely with stakeholders to translate user feedback into clean, structured datasets that directly supported front-end feature development, leading to a 60% improvement in data accuracy. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in both data engineering and software development to work on the AI-powered matching engines at your company. I know that my proficiency in the modern data stack and my bias for action align with what it takes to succeed as a Data Engineer. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
